---
title: "v8a_dit_pixel"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Description

Pixel-space DiT experiment replacing the U-Net FM backbone with token attention.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Architecture | pixel-space DiT |
| Patch size | 4 |
| Embed dim | 384 |
| Depth | 12 |
| Objective | residual Flow Matching |
| Motivation | test whether global attention places residual energy better |
| Research inspiration | DiT, AdaLN-Zero, RoPE 2D, modern diffusion transformers |

## Variables

::: {.panel-tabset}
### thetao
::: {.figure-grid}
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR / CNO / CNO+FM
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/thetao/presentation.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### HR-LR / CNO Residual / FM Residual
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/thetao/residuals.png`
:::
::: {.figure-slot}
#### CNO Error / FM Error
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/thetao/errors.png`
:::
:::
### so
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/so/`
### zos
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/zos/`
### uo
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/uo/`
### vo
`assets/figures/v8a_dit_pixel/vo/`
:::

## Metrics

`assets/metrics/v8a_dit_pixel.csv`
